title: Is there no solution for Auto connection of boards and auto update the connected board if there are updates happened in one board

posts.author: DavidIdScore (david leonard bukit)
posts.cookedHtml:
Conditions:

  1. I have developed 2 boards, 1’st with form as a main ADMIN worksheet, the 2’nd is duplication of the 1’st board, without form view and less column.
  2. I have put automation that if item created in 1st board, then 2nd board will created the same item and information but with less column

Problems:

  1. New item created in 1st board, 2nd board is following, but when the existing item gets updated inside one of its columns, the 2nd board is NOT following
  2. I have created automation to connect such 2 boards,

Questions:

  1. Are there any ways in automation settings or logics that able to make 2nd boards updated automatically if 1st boards updated, without any additional manual treatements,

Thanks a lot,
your idea and comments are very appreciated

posts.author: marissa.hill (Marissa)
posts.cookedHtml: check out the same item, multiple boards app

posts.author: kevinfantasymedia (Kevin - Fantasy Media LTD)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @DavidIdScore

I got the exact solution you’re looking for! Everything you described is possible with the Connected Boards Automations app!

You just need to set up two things here –

  1. You need an automation to connect the items (with the same name) between the two boards. Here’s are two automations that can do that. They are basically the same automation but have different triggers. Choose whichever trigger you want to use →

image2264×816 55.4 KB

image2258×810 55.2 KB

  1. Next, you need an automation that will sync any changes that you make from the first board to the second board (or vice versa). You’ll definitely find this automation useful →

image2358×742 40.2 KB

You can contact us anytime if you have questions or requests! Or Book a Demo with us for free!
